content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift routes users to a custom pre-filter star UI and only sends 4-5 star raters to an `itms-apps://…write-review` deep link while diverting lower ratings to a feedback form, bypassing `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview`; metadata description.txt also explicitly asks "rate us 5 stars!" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1).

Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits gating or filtering which users get prompted to review, and requires use of the native `requestReview`/`SKStoreReviewController` API rather than direct App Store write-review links (App/RatingGateView.swift:16-20). Combined with the "rate us 5 stars" copy in the description, this reads as a classic review-manipulation dark pattern likely to trigger a 5.6.1/5.6.3 rejection. Replace this flow with Apple's `requestReview()` shown unconditionally to all users, and remove the "5 stars" solicitation from marketing copy.
